specs.title: Client-side search and category filtering of the memory list

annotations.description: No AI memories seeded. Journey 4 requires seeded memory data (10+ memories across 5 categories: PREFERENCE, WORKFLOW, DECISION, INSTRUCTION, ENTITY_CONTEXT). Search input, category filter pills, and memory cards are NOT rendered when memory store is empty. All 5 steps of this journey CANNOT be tested.
